name: vipmp-docs-mcp
description: MCP server exposing Adobe VIP Marketplace Partner API documentation as searchable tools
long_description: Turn Adobe's Partner API docs at developer.adobe.com/vipmp/docs into queryable MCP tools. Search pages, inspect endpoints, validate request bodies against the published schemas, generate runnable curl/PowerShell/Python/C# snippets, and follow release notes — without leaving the assistant. Ships with a pre-built structured index of every endpoint, error code, and schema, refreshed daily from live Adobe docs.

tools.name: list_vipmp_docs
tools.description: Return the full sitemap of Adobe VIP Marketplace API documentation.

tools.name: search_vipmp_docs
tools.description: Search the docs by keyword or topic, ranked by title/tag/content matches.

tools.name: get_vipmp_page
tools.description: Fetch the full cleaned content of a specific documentation page.

tools.name: warm_vipmp_cache
tools.description: Pre-fetch every documentation page for stronger content-aware search.

tools.name: refresh_vipmp_sitemap
tools.description: Rebuild the documentation sitemap from Adobe's live sitemap.xml.

tools.name: vipmp_cache_stats
tools.description: Report cache size, freshness, TTL, and on-disk path.

tools.name: vipmp_cache_clear
tools.description: Drop one cache entry or wipe the whole cache.

tools.name: list_vipmp_endpoints
tools.description: List every REST endpoint (method, path, source page) from the index.

tools.name: list_vipmp_error_codes
tools.description: List all numeric and symbolic error codes with triggers.

tools.name: get_vipmp_schema
tools.description: Return the field schema for a resource (name, type, required, constraints).

tools.name: get_vipmp_code_examples
tools.description: Pull code blocks off a documentation page, optionally filtered by language.

tools.name: rebuild_vipmp_index
tools.description: Rebuild the structured endpoints/error-codes/schemas index from live docs.

tools.name: list_vipmp_releases
tools.description: Structured release notes — dated entries grouped by section.

tools.name: vipmp_server_info
tools.description: Diagnostic info: version, Python, index age, cache stats, log path.

tools.name: describe_vipmp_endpoint
tools.description: One-shot endpoint profile: schema, error codes, release notes, examples.

tools.name: validate_vipmp_request
tools.description: Check a JSON request body against the endpoint's published schema.

tools.name: generate_vipmp_request
tools.description: Emit a runnable curl / PowerShell / Python / C# snippet for an endpoint.
